initiatives.name: Albany Social Justice Center
initiatives.description: A community space fostering mutual aid and social justice through organizing, education, and direct support. They provide a hub for movement building, resource sharing, and collective action while creating spaces for community empowerment and transformative change.

initiatives.name: Food Not Bombs Albany
initiatives.description: A mutual aid collective fostering food justice and community solidarity through free food sharing in Albany. They coordinate regular meal distributions, food recovery initiatives, and solidarity networks while building power through direct action, community care, and creating spaces for food sovereignty and collective nourishment.

initiatives.name: Albany Free Store
initiatives.description: Every 3rd Saturday of the month. A mutual aid event for collecting and distributing clothing, home goods, and hygiene products.

initiatives.name: Palestinian Rights Committee Albany
initiatives.description: Supporting Palestinian liberation in the Capital Region of NY for over 40 years.

initiatives.name: Healthcare Workers for Palestine - Albany
initiatives.description: We are a collective of healthcare workers and students in Albany, NY, demanding acknowledgment and solidarity from our health systems and hospitals

initiatives.name: Jewish Voice for Peace - Albany
initiatives.description: Capital Region NY Jews organizing toward Palestinian liberation and Judaism beyond Zionism.

initiatives.name: United Tenants of Albany
initiatives.description: The mission of UTA is to protect tenants' rights to safe, decent and affordable housing

initiatives.name: Refugee and Immigrant Support Services of Emmaus
initiatives.description: Supporting refugees and immigrants to build new lives and thrive in the Capital Region.

initiatives.name: Capital District DSA
initiatives.description: Organizing locally to build socialism and fight for a better world!

initiatives.name: Capital District Socialist Party
initiatives.description: A local chapter of the Socialist Party organizing for social and economic justice.

initiatives.name: Free Food Fridge Albany
initiatives.description: Creating a program to fight food insecurity

initiatives.name: 518 Free Store
initiatives.description: Schenectady's 518 Free Store is a grassroots effort dedicated to bridging the gap between NEED and AID in local BIPOC communities.
